### III. EDUCATIONAL FIELDS (Pedagogical Branching)

Each module can be taught, cited, or studied under one of three scaffold tiers:

| Tier | Focus | Output Formats |
|------|-------|----------------|
| **FOUNDATION** | Core concepts (recursion, remix, modularity) | Manifestos, onboarding docs |
| **METHOD** | Applied techniques (audio layering, symbolic logic) | Lesson plans, syllabi |
| **APPLICATION** | Live case studies (project deep dives) | Studio curriculum, workshops |

**Example Cross-Domain Class:**
- “Dream Mechanics: Horror, Myth, and Subconscious Design” (GR1ND3R + MET4 + DR34M.L0G1K)
- “Queer Voice & Memory Systems” (Q_v33R + FLOAT1NG.P01NTS + ETCETER4)
